quoteDescription: PO426 - 20ml Paint Blend UK US - 36x80mm Complex
lineDescription: || ||PO415 - 20ml Paint Blend - 36x80mm Complex||Size: 36mm x 80mm||Material: PE AP901||Print Colour: 6 Colour||Tool: D0892(3,7)(3,2)0.6mm Complex||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: MATTE VARNISH||MACHINE APPLIED||Supply: 3mm Gap - Rolls of 5,000||Qty: 25,000||5000 x UK Baby Pink PANTONE 217 C||5000 x UK Candy PANTONE 218 C||5000 x UK Lavender PANTONE 2092 C||5000 x UK Purple PANTONE 7677 C||5000 x US Black - PANTONENEUTRAL BLACK C|| Group discount applied (PO415/416/425/426)||||
